data.body: Implemented + independently reviewed. Pure-stdlib IR<->BPMN serializer: structure->BPMN element types (scriptTask/serviceTask+<rebar:Agent>/exclusiveGateway/subProcess+loop|multiInstance), needs->sequenceFlow, nesting->subprocess; exact config in <rebar:Config> so round-trip is IDENTITY. Deterministic DI auto-layout (never committed). rebar.moddle.json ships the descriptor for extension survival (POC gotcha). Reviewer found no blockers on the Python round-trip; reachable correctness findings ALL fixed+property-tested: XSD child order (extensionElements first), start/end-event re-import no longer fabricates needs, bare subprocess = clear error, needs order preserved, explicit type round-trips. 21 bpmn tests (incl 8 property fixtures), 186 workflow tests pass, ruff clean. DEFERRED to 744b (editor story): synthetic start/end events + per-subprocess DI planes for ideal bpmn-js rendering. Commit f628df05.
